tools.name: search_businesses
tools.description: Search 47,000+ local business profiles by name, category, or location.

tools.name: get_business
tools.description: Get full profile for a specific business including contact info, services, ratings, and hours.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all available business categories in the directory.

tools.name: request_service
tools.description: Submit a service request to a business on behalf of a consumer.

tools.name: search_by_service
tools.description: Find businesses that offer a specific service type. Useful when you know the exact service rather than the category — e.g. "Drain cleaning" rather than "plumbing".

tools.name: get_reviews
tools.description: Get reviews for a specific business including Bezal Verified reviews and Google rating.

tools.name: get_service_catalog
tools.description: Get services and pricing for a specific business. Falls back to the services list if no priced catalog exists.

tools.name: check_business_availability
tools.description: Check if a business has availability on a specific date using their Bezal calendar. Best-effort — only works for businesses that use the calendar feature.

tools.name: compare_businesses
tools.description: Compare up to 5 businesses side-by-side on ratings, services, BezalRank, and profile status.

tools.name: search_by_city
tools.description: Search for businesses in a specific city, optionally filtered by category. City-level matching.

tools.name: search_providers
tools.description: Legacy alias for search_businesses. Prefer search_businesses for new clients.

tools.name: get_provider_details
tools.description: Legacy alias for get_business. Prefer get_business for new clients.

tools.name: submit_quote_request
tools.description: Legacy alias for request_service. Prefer request_service for new clients.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: get_reviews · Private data: get_business · Public sink: request_service, submit_quote_request.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: get_reviews · Private data: get_business · Public sink: request_service, submit_quote_request

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.

title: Tool removed since last scan
detail: Tool "search_providers" is no longer advertised. Removal can precede a shadowing replacement from another server.

confidence.title: Tool removed since last scan
confidence.detail: Tool "get_provider_details" is no longer advertised. Removal can precede a shadowing replacement from another server.

confidence.title: Tool removed since last scan
confidence.detail: Tool "submit_quote_request" is no longer advertised. Removal can precede a shadowing replacement from another server.
